title: DialogueScript
description: Phase 6.1 — ordered list of utterances the dialogue-narrative edit needs. Produced from the user prompt by the dialogue scriptwriter. Read by dialogue_search to find candidate snippets across all ingested transcripts.

concept.description: One-sentence summary of what the spliced dialogue should mean.

text.description: The literal utterance the engine should find or assemble.

intent.description: Editorial purpose — defiant, recognition, turn, declaration, question, etc.

target_duration_ms.description: How long the spoken line should be when found.

voice_register.description: Vocal quality preference for the search stage.

fandom_constraint.description: Restrict candidates to a particular fandom/source.
